criteria.criterion: Every RPC call logs per-call latency (Go side)
criteria.check: TestLatencyInterceptor success + error subtests assert Duration>0 recorded for every call via a real gRPC round trip

criteria.criterion: Interceptor is a grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor wireable via grpc.UnaryInterceptor/ChainUnaryInterceptor
criteria.check: interceptor_test.go constructs a real grpc.NewServer(grpc.UnaryInterceptor(LatencyInterceptor(...))) and demonstrates it intercepting real RPCs

criteria.criterion: Format a future benchmark harness can consume
criteria.check: RPCMetric struct is a stable, typed record (method/duration/bytes/code) passed to a pluggable Recorder; default SlogRecorder emits structured key=value fields, not free-text

criteria.criterion: Does not change existing handler behavior/response semantics
criteria.check: interceptor_test.go asserts response payloads/error codes from wrapped calls are identical to server_test.go's existing non-intercepted expectations (GetFile success content, NotFound code)

criteria.criterion: go test ./engine/rpc/... -run TestLatencyInterceptor (issue's named test spec)
criteria.check: test function named exactly TestLatencyInterceptor in engine/rpc/interceptor_test.go

criteria.criterion: Concurrency safety of any shared state
criteria.check: go test ./engine/rpc/... -race -run TestLatencyInterceptor -timeout 5m; interceptor itself holds no shared mutable state (stateless per call), test Recorder uses a mutex-guarded slice

criteria.criterion: (bundled, non-blocking, explicitly flagged) FileId=0 on GetFile/ReadPartial returns a caller-input code, not codes.Internal
criteria.check: server_test.go GetFile_ZeroFileID / ReadPartial_ZeroFileID subtests assert codes.InvalidArgument
gofmt -l engine/rpc, go vet ./..., go build ./... all clean from engine/
